text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-oid.html" title="string">oid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="font-weight:bold">Motif requis: </span><span style="color: darkgreen">1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.9.1.3.6</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck135.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationNormal" title="Slice iheModeAdministrationNormal: Mode d'administration : normal">templateId:iheModeAdministrationNormal</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.6"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-II.html">II</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Mode d'administration : normal. Administration sans précaution particulière à prendre. Dans ce cas, ne pas utiliser d'entrée subordonnée.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1340.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end_slice.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationNormal.root">@root</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root.5"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-oid.html" title="string">oid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-uuid.html" title="string">uuid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-ruid.html" title="string">ruid</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="font-weight:bold">Motif requis: </span><span style="color: darkgreen">1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.7.1</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck135.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesProgressives" title="Slice iheModeAdministrationDosesProgressives: Mode d'administration : doses progressives">templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesProgressives</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.7"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-II.html">II</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Mode d'administration : doses progressives. Administration pour les médicamments dont la posologie optimale (ou l'arrêt) n'est obtenue que progressivement, par paliers. Par exemple :
- 0.5 mg par jour pendant 3 jours ;
- puis 1 mg par jour les 5 jours suivants ;
- puis 2 mg par jour.
Souvent, en particulier lorsque l'arrêt brusque du traitement peut avoir des conséquences négatives, les doses sont réduites progressivement. Les doses peuvent être ajustées en modifiant la fréquence de la dose, la quantité de la dose, ou les deux. Lorsque la fréquence de la dose est simplement ajustée (par ex. 5 mg de prednisone deux fois par jour pendant trois jours, puis 5 mg par jour pendant trois jours, puis 5 mg tous les deux jours), 
une seule entrée Traitement est nécessaire et les différentes fréquences sont enregistrées dans l'élement. Lorsque la dose varie (par ex. 15 mg de prednisone par jour pendant trois jours, puis 10 mg par jour pendant trois jours, puis 5 mg par jour pendant trois jours), un composant subordonné doit être créé pour chaque dose.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1340.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end_slice.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesProgressives.root">@root</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root.6"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-oid.html" title="string">oid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-uuid.html" title="string">uuid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-ruid.html" title="string">ruid</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="font-weight:bold">Motif requis: </span><span style="color: darkgreen">1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.8</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck135.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesFractionnees" title="Slice iheModeAdministrationDosesFractionnees: Mode d'administration : doses fractionnées">templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesFractionnees</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.8"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-II.html">II</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Mode d'administration : doses fractionnées. Administration de médicaments dont la posologie varie d'un jour sur l'autre. Par exemple : Coumadine : ¼ cp les jours pairs et ½ cp les jours impairs. 
Une dose fractionnée est souvent utilisée lorsque différentes doses sont administrées à différents moments (par ex. à différents moments de la journée ou sur des jours différents). Il peut s'agir de tenir compte de différents taux métaboliques à différents moments de la journée ou simplement d'aborder les carences du boîtage des médicaments (par ex. 2 mg de Coumadin les jours pairs et 2,5 mg les jours impairs parce que la Coumadine n'existe pas sous une forme posologique à 2,25 mg).
Dans ce cas, une entrée subordonnée  est requise pour chaque dose fractionnée.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1340.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end_slice.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesFractionnees.root">@root</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root.7"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-oid.html" title="string">oid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-uuid.html" title="string">uuid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-ruid.html" title="string">ruid</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="font-weight:bold">Motif requis: </span><span style="color: darkgreen">1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.9</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck135.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesConditionnelles" title="Slice iheModeAdministrationDosesConditionnelles: Mode d'administration : doses conditionnelles">templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesConditionnelles</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.9"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-II.html">II</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Mode d'administration : doses conditionnelles. Administration en fonction d'un événement (typiquement dosage de la glycémie pour les diabétiques). 
Une dose conditionnelle est souvent utilisée lorsque la quantité de la dose diffère en fonction de certaines mesures (p. ex. une dose d'insuline en fonction du taux de glycémie). Dans ce cas, une entrée subordonnée  est requise pour chaque dose conditionnelle.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1340.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end_slice.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAdministrationDosesConditionnelles.root">@root</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root.8"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-oid.html" title="string">oid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-uuid.html" title="string">uuid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-ruid.html" title="string">ruid</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="font-weight:bold">Motif requis: </span><span style="color: darkgreen">1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.10</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck135.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAadministrationDosesCombinees" title="Slice iheModeAadministrationDosesCombinees: Mode d'administration : doses combinées">templateId:iheModeAadministrationDosesCombinees</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.10"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-II.html">II</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Mode d'administration : doses combinées. Administration de médicaments combinés à d'autres dans le contexte d'une même prise. Une association médicamenteuse est composée de deux ou plusieurs autres médicaments. 
Ceux-ci peuvent être préemballés, comme l'Acuilix, qui est une combinaison d'hydrochlorothiazide et de quinapril dans des proportions prédéfinies, ou préparés par un pharmacien. 
Dans le cas d'une association médicamenteuse préemballée, il suffit de fournir le nom du produit médicamenteux d'association et la désignation de sa concentration dans une seule entrée . L'information posologique doit ensuite être enregistrée sous la forme d'un simple comptage des unités d'administration.
Dans le cas d'un mélange préparé, la description du mélange doit être fournie en tant que nom du produit, dans l'entrée . Cette entrée peut, mais ce n'est pas obligatoire, avoir des entrées subordonnées sous cette entrée pour enregistrer les composants du mélange.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1340.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end_slice.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAadministrationDosesCombinees.root">@root</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root.9"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-uuid.html" title="string">uuid</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-ruid.html" title="string">ruid</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="font-weight:bold">Motif requis: </span><span style="color: darkgreen">1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.11</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck135.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheModeAadministrationDosesDebutDiffere" title="Slice iheModeAadministrationDosesDebutDiffere: Mode d'administration : doses à début différé">templateId:iheModeAadministrationDosesDebutDiffere</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.11"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-II.html">II</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Mode d'administration : doses à début différé. Administration de médicaments dont le début est différée et ne peut être calculés. Exemples : 3 jours avant le voyage, 1 jour avant une intervention. Dans ce cas, ne pas utiliser de  subordonné.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; si le traitement est en attente d'administration">@moodCode</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-cs-simple.html" title="code">cs</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Si le traitement a déjà été administré
ou si information rapportée par le patient
ou si aucun traitement : moodCode='EVN' ;     
Si le traitement est en attente d'administration : moodCode='INT'</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.id" title="Identifiant de l'entrée">id</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.id"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">*</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-II.html">II</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Identifiant de l'entrée</td></tr>

text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="font-weight:bold; font-style: italic">Slice: </span><span style="font-style: italic">Non ordonné, Ouvert par pattern:operator</span></td></tr>

padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck134.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:effectiveTimeDuree" title="Slice effectiveTimeDuree">effectiveTime:effectiveTimeDuree</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime.2"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;" href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/conformance-rules.html#constraints" title="Cet élément a ou est affecté par des contraintes ( fr-operator-not-a, fr-effectiveTime-duree-type )">C</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-SXCM-TS.html">SXCM_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-IVL-TS.html">IVL_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-EIVL-TS.html">EIVL_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-PIVL-TS.html">PIVL_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-SXPR-TS.html">SXPR_TS</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Durée de traitement<br class="constraint"/><span title="null" class="constraint">Constraints: </span><span style="font-weight:bold" title="operator doit être différent de A" class="constraint">fr-operator-not-a</span><span title="null" class="constraint">, </span><span style="font-weight:bold" title="La durée doit être IVL-TS" class="constraint">fr-effectiveTime-duree-type</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck124.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:effectiveTimeFrequence" title="Slice effectiveTimeFrequence">effectiveTime:effectiveTimeFrequence</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime.3"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;" href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/conformance-rules.html#constraints" title="Cet élément a ou est affecté par des contraintes ( fr-operator-a, fr-effectiveTime-frequence-types )">C</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..*</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-SXCM-TS.html">SXCM_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-IVL-TS.html">IVL_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-EIVL-TS.html">EIVL_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-PIVL-TS.html">PIVL_TS</a><span style="opacity: 0.5">, </span><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-SXPR-TS.html">SXPR_TS</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Fréquence d'administration<br class="constraint"/><span title="null" class="constraint">Constraints: </span><span style="font-weight:bold" title="operator doit être A" class="constraint">fr-operator-a</span><span title="null" class="constraint">, </span><span style="font-weight:bold" title="La fréquence doit être SXCM-TS, PIVL-TS, EIVL-TS ou SXPR-TS" class="constraint">fr-effectiveTime-frequence-types</span><br/></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.routeCode" title="Voie d'administration">routeCode</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-CE.html">CE</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Voie d'administration : Si la voie d'administration est connue, elle doit être indiquée (code et displayName). Si elle n'est pas connue, la raison pour laquelle elle est inconnue peut être décrite en utilisant l'attribut nullFlavor.Terminologie utilisée :  EDQM - Standard terms / classe ROA (Voie d'administration)</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode" title="Région anatomique d'administration">approachSiteCode</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">*</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-CD.html">CD</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Région anatomique d'administration : La région anatomique d'administration provient du JDV_HumanSubstanceAdministrationSite_CISIS (1.2.250.1.213.1.1.5.686) (Terminologie SNOMED CT 2.16.840.1.113883.6.96). Cet élément doit contenir une référence pointant sur l'élément correspondant de la partie narrative où la région anatomique est décrite.<br class="binding"/><span style="font-weight:bold" title="null" class="binding">Binding: </span><a href="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/terminologies/1.10.0/ValueSet-jdv-human-substance-administration-site-cisis.html" title="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-human-substance-administration-site-cisis" class="binding">JDV Human Substance Administration Site CISIS</a><span title="null" class="binding"> (</span><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/terminologies.html#required" title="To be conformant, the concept in this element SHALL be from the specified value set." class="binding">required</a><span title="null" class="binding">)</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck101.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText">originalText</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-ED.html">ED</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1000.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.reference">reference</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.reference"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-TEL.html">TEL</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity" title="Dose à administrer">doseQuantity</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-IVL-PQ.html">IVL_PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Dose à administrer : 

S'il n'y a pas de traitement, utiliser une valeur nullFlavor.
S'il y a un traitement, les sous-éléments 'low' et 'high' permettent de fournir les doses minimales et maximales à administrer. Dans le cas où la dose est fixe, ces deux sous-éléments prendront les mêmes valeurs. Dans chaque élément 'low' et 'high', un élément 'translation' peut permettre de pointer sur l'élément de la partie narrative relative à cette information.
Dans le cas où l'on s'exprime en quantités indénombrables, l'unité doit être transmise. Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM.
Dans le cas où l'on s'exprime en quantités dénombrables (capsules, comprimés, gélules, etc.) l'unité ne doit pas être renseignée. A la place, on ajoute un champ 'translation' qui permet de pointer sur l'élément de la partie narrative relative à cette information.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck111.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low">low</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-IVXB-PQ.html">IVXB_PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1101.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation">translation</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span>..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-PQR.html">PQR</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; <tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity">rateQuantity</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-IVL-PQ.html">IVL_PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Rythme d'administration : 

Le rythme d'administration permet d'indiquer la quantité de produit à administrer par unité de temps.
Les sous-éléments 'low' et 'high' permettent de fournir le rythme minimal et maximal de l'administration. Dans le cas où le rythme est fixe, ces deux sous-éléments prendront les mêmes valeurs.
L'argument @value permet d'indiquer la quantité de produit à administrer.
L'argument @unit permet d'indiquer le rythme d'administration en combinant l'unité de quantité et l'unité de temps (séparés par le caractère ‘/'). Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM.
Dans chaque élément 'low' et 'high', un élément 'translation' peut permettre de pointer sur l'élément de la partie narrative relative à cette information.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.nullFlavor">@nullFlavor</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.nullFlavor"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-cs-simple.html" title="code">cs</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>

<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity">maxDoseQuantity</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-RTO-PQ-PQ.html">RTO_PQ_PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Dose maximale à administrer : 

La dose maximale à 'maxDoseQuantity' permet d'indiquer la quantité maximale de produit à administrer par unité de temps.
Plusieurs occurrences de 'maxDoseQuantity' peuvent être utilisées pour indiquer différentes limites sur différentes périodes de temps.
Les sous-éléments 'numerator' et 'denominator' permettent de fournir :
- numerator : la quantité maximale à administrer,
- denominator : la plage de temps sur laquelle s'applique ce maximum.
Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck111.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator">numerator</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-PQ.html">PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>

padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1340.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end_slice.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_resource.png" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Ressource" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementSubordonne.substanceAdministration" title="Traitement subordonné">substanceAdministration</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.substanceAdministration"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-subordonne.html" title="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SubstanceAdministration">FRCDATraitementSubordonne</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Traitement subordonné : 

Une entrée Traitement de premier niveau peut contenir une ou plusieurs sous-entrées 'Traitement' subordonnées pour les cas spécifiques des dosages progressifs, fractionnés ou conditionnels, ou pour gérer la combinaison de médicaments.
L'utilisation de sous-entrées 'Traitement' subordonnées pour traiter ces cas est facultative. Dans ce cas, l'information doit être fournie dans la partie narrative de l'entrée 'Traitement' de premier niveau sous forme de texte libre.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck135.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_slicer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_slice_item.png" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Élément de Slice" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient" title="Slice frInstructionsAuPatient">entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.4"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-EntryRelationship.html">EntryRelationship</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid;
