             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:frTraitementAigu.extension">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.classCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.classCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.classCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <fixedCode value="SBADM"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAActClass"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <short
             value="Si le traitement a déjà été administré
ou si information rapportée par le patient
ou si aucun traitement : moodCode='EVN' ;     
Si le traitement est en attente d'administration : moodCode='INT'"/>
      <definition
                  value="Si le traitement a déjà été administré ou si information rapportée par le patient ou si aucun traitement; si le traitement est en attente d'administration"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xDocumentSubstanceMood|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.id">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.id"/>
      <short value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.id"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code"/>
      <short value="Acte ou situation"/>
      <definition value="Acte ou situation"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/ValueSet/fr-valueset-code-traitement"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemVersion">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.displayName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.originalText">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.qualifier">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.negationInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text"/>
      <short value="Partie narrative de l’entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.compression">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.compression"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Compression"/>
      <definition
                  value="Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.compression"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDACompressionAlgorithm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.integrityCheck">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.integrityCheck"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check"/>
      <definition
                  value="The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheck"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="base64Binary"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bin"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.integrityCheckAlgorithm">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check Algorithm"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-IntegrityCheckAlgorithm|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.language">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.language"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Language"/>
      <definition
                  value="For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.language"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.mediaType">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.mediaType"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Media Type"/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies the type of the encapsulated data and identifies a method to interpret or render the data."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.mediaType"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-MediaType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.representation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.representation"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.representation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/BinaryDataEncoding"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.xmlText">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.xmlText"/>
      <representation value="xmlText"/>
      <short
             value="Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string."/>
      <definition
                  value="Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)"/>
      <comment
               value="This element is represented in XML as textual content. The actual name &quot;xmlText&quot; will not appear in a CDA instance."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.xmlText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.reference">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.reference"/>
      <label value="Reference"/>
      <definition
                  value="A telecommunication address (TEL), such as a URL for HTTP or FTP, which will resolve to precisely the same binary data that could as well have been provided as inline data."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.reference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TEL"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text.thumbnail">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text.thumbnail"/>
      <label value="Thumbnail"/>
      <definition
                  value="An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.thumbnail"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode"/>
      <short
             value="Statut de l’entrée : Fixé à la valeur 'completed' car l’administration a déjà été réalisée ou ordonnée"/>
      <definition value="Statut de l’entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActStatus"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="completed"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystem">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemVersion">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.displayName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.originalText">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.qualifier">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-defaulttype">
        <valueCanonical
                        value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="pattern"/>
          <path value="operator"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:effectiveTimeDuree">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-defaulttype">
        <valueCanonical
                        value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <sliceName value="effectiveTimeDuree"/>
      <short value="Durée de traitement"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-operator-not-a"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="operator doit être différent de A"/>
        <expression value="operator != 'A'"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-effectiveTime-duree-type"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="La durée doit être IVL-TS"/>
        <expression value="is(IVL_TS)"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:effectiveTimeFrequence">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-defaulttype">
        <valueCanonical
                        value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <sliceName value="effectiveTimeFrequence"/>
      <short value="Fréquence d'administration"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-operator-a"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="operator doit être A"/>
        <expression value="operator = 'A'"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-effectiveTime-frequence-types"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="La fréquence doit être SXCM-TS, PIVL-TS, EIVL-TS ou SXPR-TS"/>
        <expression
                    value="is(SXCM_TS) or is(PIVL_TS) or is(EIVL_TS) or is(SXPR_TS)"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.priorityCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.priorityCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.priorityCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActPriority"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.repeatNumber">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.repeatNumber"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.repeatNumber"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-INT"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode"/>
      <short
             value="Voie d'administration : Si la voie d'administration est connue, elle doit être indiquée (code et displayName). Si elle n'est pas connue, la raison pour laquelle elle est inconnue peut être décrite en utilisant l'attribut nullFlavor.Terminologie utilisée :  EDQM - Standard terms / classe ROA (Voie d'administration)"/>
      <definition value="Voie d'administration"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-RouteOfAdministration"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode"/>
      <short
             value="Région anatomique d'administration : La région anatomique d'administration provient du JDV_HumanSubstanceAdministrationSite_CISIS (1.2.250.1.213.1.1.5.686) (Terminologie SNOMED CT 2.16.840.1.113883.6.96). Cet élément doit contenir une référence pointant sur l'élément correspondant de la partie narrative où la région anatomique est décrite."/>
      <definition value="Région anatomique d'administration"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-human-substance-administration-site-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.codeSystem">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.codeSystemName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.codeSystemVersion">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.displayName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.compression">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.compression"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Compression"/>
      <definition
                  value="Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.compression"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDACompressionAlgorithm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.integrityCheck">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.integrityCheck"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check"/>
      <definition
                  value="The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheck"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="base64Binary"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bin"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check Algorithm"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-IntegrityCheckAlgorithm|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.language">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.language"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Language"/>
      <definition
                  value="For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.language"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.mediaType">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.mediaType"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Media Type"/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies the type of the encapsulated data and identifies a method to interpret or render the data."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.mediaType"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-MediaType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.representation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.representation"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.representation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/BinaryDataEncoding"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.xmlText">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.xmlText"/>
      <representation value="xmlText"/>
      <short
             value="Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string."/>
      <definition
                  value="Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)"/>
      <comment
               value="This element is represented in XML as textual content. The actual name &quot;xmlText&quot; will not appear in a CDA instance."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.xmlText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.reference">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.reference"/>
      <label value="Reference"/>
      <definition
                  value="A telecommunication address (TEL), such as a URL for HTTP or FTP, which will resolve to precisely the same binary data that could as well have been provided as inline data."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.reference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TEL"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.thumbnail">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.originalText.thumbnail"/>
      <label value="Thumbnail"/>
      <definition
                  value="An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.thumbnail"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.qualifier">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Dose à administrer : 

S'il n'y a pas de traitement, utiliser une valeur nullFlavor.
S'il y a un traitement, les sous-éléments 'low' et 'high' permettent de fournir les doses minimales et maximales à administrer. Dans le cas où la dose est fixe, ces deux sous-éléments prendront les mêmes valeurs. Dans chaque élément 'low' et 'high', un élément 'translation' peut permettre de pointer sur l'élément de la partie narrative relative à cette information.
Dans le cas où l'on s'exprime en quantités indénombrables, l'unité doit être transmise. Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM.
Dans le cas où l'on s'exprime en quantités dénombrables (capsules, comprimés, gélules, etc.) l'unité ne doit pas être renseignée. A la place, on ajoute un champ 'translation' qui permet de pointer sur l'élément de la partie narrative relative à cette information."/>
      <definition value="Dose à administrer"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.unit">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.unit"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Unit of Measure"/>
      <definition
                  value="The unit of measure specified in the Unified Code for Units of Measure (UCUM) []."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.unit"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.value">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Maginitude Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the quantity measured in terms of the unit."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.translation"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="An alternative representation of the same physical quantity expressed in a different unit, of a different unit code system and possibly with a different value."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.operator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.operator"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="A code specifying whether the set component is included (union) or excluded (set-difference) from the set, or other set operations with the current set component and the set as constructed from the representation stream up to the current point."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.operator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="I"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDASetOperator"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low"/>
      <label value="Low Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the low limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.low"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-PQ"/>

            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.code"/>

                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>

      <max value="1"/>

      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <profile

      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.compression">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.compression"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Compression"/>
      <definition
                  value="Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.compression"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDACompressionAlgorithm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheck">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheck"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check"/>
      <definition
                  value="The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheck"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="base64Binary"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bin"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check Algorithm"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-IntegrityCheckAlgorithm|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.language">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.language"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Language"/>
      <definition
                  value="For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.language"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>

      <binding>

        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-MediaType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.representation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.representation"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>

      </type>

      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.xmlText">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.xmlText"/>
      <representation value="xmlText"/>
      <short
             value="Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string."/>
      <definition
                  value="Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)"/>
      <comment
               value="This element is represented in XML as textual content. The actual name &quot;xmlText&quot; will not appear in a CDA instance."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.xmlText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.reference">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.reference"/>
      <label value="Reference"/>
      <definition
                  value="A telecommunication address (TEL), such as a URL for HTTP or FTP, which will resolve to precisely the same binary data that could as well have been provided as inline data."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.reference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TEL"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.thumbnail">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.originalText.thumbnail"/>
      <label value="Thumbnail"/>
      <definition
                  value="An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.thumbnail"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.qualifier">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.translation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.value">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.translation.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the measurement value in terms of the unit specified by this code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQR.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.inclusive">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.low.inclusive"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies whether the limit is included in the interval (interval is closed) or excluded from the interval (interval is open)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVXB_PQ.inclusive"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.center">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.center"/>
      <label value="Central Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The arithmetic mean of the interval (low plus high divided by 2). The purpose of distinguishing the center as a semantic property is for conversions of intervals from and to point values."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.center"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.width">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.width"/>
      <label value="Width"/>
      <definition
                  value="The difference between high and low boundary. The purpose of distinguishing a width property is to handle all cases of incomplete information symmetrically. In any interval representation only two of the three properties high, low, and width need to be stated and the third can be derived."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.width"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high"/>
      <label value="High Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the high limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.high"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>

                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>

      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.unit">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.unit"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

        <max value="1"/>

      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation"/>

      <max value="1"/>

            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.code"/>

      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>

                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>

    </element>

             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.compression">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.compression"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Compression"/>
      <definition
                  value="Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.compression"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
