                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDACompressionAlgorithm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheck">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheck"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check"/>
      <definition
                  value="The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheck"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="base64Binary"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bin"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check Algorithm"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-IntegrityCheckAlgorithm|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>

             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.language">

            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.originalText.language"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Language"/>
      <definition
                  value="For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <max value="1"/>

      <definition
                  value="Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)"/>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      <definition

      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

      <label value="Thumbnail"/>
      <definition
                  value="An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference."/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.qualifier">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.translation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.value">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.translation.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the measurement value in terms of the unit specified by this code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQR.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.inclusive">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity.high.inclusive"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies whether the limit is included in the interval (interval is closed) or excluded from the interval (interval is open)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVXB_PQ.inclusive"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Rythme d'administration : 

Le rythme d'administration permet d'indiquer la quantité de produit à administrer par unité de temps.
Les sous-éléments 'low' et 'high' permettent de fournir le rythme minimal et maximal de l'administration. Dans le cas où le rythme est fixe, ces deux sous-éléments prendront les mêmes valeurs.
L'argument @value permet d'indiquer la quantité de produit à administrer.
L'argument @unit permet d'indiquer le rythme d'administration en combinant l'unité de quantité et l'unité de temps (séparés par le caractère ‘/'). Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM.
Dans chaque élément 'low' et 'high', un élément 'translation' peut permettre de pointer sur l'élément de la partie narrative relative à cette information."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.unit">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.unit"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Unit of Measure"/>
      <definition
                  value="The unit of measure specified in the Unified Code for Units of Measure (UCUM) []."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.unit"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.value">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Maginitude Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the quantity measured in terms of the unit."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.translation"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="An alternative representation of the same physical quantity expressed in a different unit, of a different unit code system and possibly with a different value."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.operator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.operator"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="A code specifying whether the set component is included (union) or excluded (set-difference) from the set, or other set operations with the current set component and the set as constructed from the representation stream up to the current point."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.operator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="I"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDASetOperator"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low"/>
      <label value="Low Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the low limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.low"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.unit">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.unit"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Unit of Measure"/>
      <definition
                  value="The unit of measure specified in the Unified Code for Units of Measure (UCUM) []."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.unit"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.value">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Maginitude Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the quantity measured in terms of the unit."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>

    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="An alternative representation of the same physical quantity expressed in a different unit, of a different unit code system and possibly with a different value."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQR"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.code">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.codeSystem">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.codeSystemName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.codeSystemVersion">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.displayName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.compression">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.compression"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Compression"/>
      <definition
                  value="Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.compression"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDACompressionAlgorithm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheck">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheck"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check"/>
      <definition
                  value="The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheck"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="base64Binary"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bin"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check Algorithm"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-IntegrityCheckAlgorithm|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.language">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.language"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Language"/>
      <definition
                  value="For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.language"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.mediaType">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.mediaType"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Media Type"/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies the type of the encapsulated data and identifies a method to interpret or render the data."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.mediaType"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-MediaType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.representation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.representation"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.representation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/BinaryDataEncoding"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.xmlText">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.xmlText"/>
      <representation value="xmlText"/>
      <short
             value="Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string."/>
      <definition
                  value="Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)"/>
      <comment
               value="This element is represented in XML as textual content. The actual name &quot;xmlText&quot; will not appear in a CDA instance."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.xmlText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.reference">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.reference"/>
      <label value="Reference"/>
      <definition
                  value="A telecommunication address (TEL), such as a URL for HTTP or FTP, which will resolve to precisely the same binary data that could as well have been provided as inline data."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.reference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TEL"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.thumbnail">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.originalText.thumbnail"/>
      <label value="Thumbnail"/>
      <definition
                  value="An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.thumbnail"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.qualifier">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.translation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.value">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.translation.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the measurement value in terms of the unit specified by this code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQR.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.inclusive">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.low.inclusive"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies whether the limit is included in the interval (interval is closed) or excluded from the interval (interval is open)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVXB_PQ.inclusive"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.center">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.center"/>
      <label value="Central Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The arithmetic mean of the interval (low plus high divided by 2). The purpose of distinguishing the center as a semantic property is for conversions of intervals from and to point values."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.center"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.width">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.width"/>
      <label value="Width"/>
      <definition
                  value="The difference between high and low boundary. The purpose of distinguishing a width property is to handle all cases of incomplete information symmetrically. In any interval representation only two of the three properties high, low, and width need to be stated and the third can be derived."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.width"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high"/>
      <label value="High Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the high limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_PQ.high"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.unit">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.unit"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Unit of Measure"/>
      <definition
                  value="The unit of measure specified in the Unified Code for Units of Measure (UCUM) []."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.unit"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.value">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Maginitude Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the quantity measured in terms of the unit."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="An alternative representation of the same physical quantity expressed in a different unit, of a different unit code system and possibly with a different value."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQR"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.code">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.codeSystem">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.codeSystemName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.codeSystemVersion">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.displayName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.compression">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.compression"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Compression"/>
      <definition
                  value="Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.compression"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDACompressionAlgorithm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheck">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheck"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check"/>
      <definition
                  value="The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheck"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="base64Binary"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bin"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check Algorithm"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-IntegrityCheckAlgorithm|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.language">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.language"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Language"/>
      <definition
                  value="For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.language"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.mediaType">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.mediaType"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Media Type"/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies the type of the encapsulated data and identifies a method to interpret or render the data."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.mediaType"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-MediaType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.representation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.representation"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.representation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/BinaryDataEncoding"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.xmlText">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.xmlText"/>
      <representation value="xmlText"/>
      <short
             value="Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string."/>
      <definition
                  value="Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)"/>
      <comment
               value="This element is represented in XML as textual content. The actual name &quot;xmlText&quot; will not appear in a CDA instance."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.xmlText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.reference">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.reference"/>
      <label value="Reference"/>
      <definition
                  value="A telecommunication address (TEL), such as a URL for HTTP or FTP, which will resolve to precisely the same binary data that could as well have been provided as inline data."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.reference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TEL"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.thumbnail">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.originalText.thumbnail"/>
      <label value="Thumbnail"/>
      <definition
                  value="An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.thumbnail"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.qualifier">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.translation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.value">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.translation.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the measurement value in terms of the unit specified by this code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQR.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.inclusive">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity.high.inclusive"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies whether the limit is included in the interval (interval is closed) or excluded from the interval (interval is open)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVXB_PQ.inclusive"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Dose maximale à administrer : 

La dose maximale à 'maxDoseQuantity' permet d'indiquer la quantité maximale de produit à administrer par unité de temps.
Plusieurs occurrences de 'maxDoseQuantity' peuvent être utilisées pour indiquer différentes limites sur différentes périodes de temps.
Les sous-éléments 'numerator' et 'denominator' permettent de fournir :
- numerator : la quantité maximale à administrer,
- denominator : la plage de temps sur laquelle s'applique ce maximum.
Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/RTO-PQ-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator"/>
      <label value="Numerator"/>
      <definition
                  value="The quantity that is being divided in the ratio. The default is the integer number 1 (one.)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="RTO_PQ_PQ.numerator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.unit">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.unit"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Unit of Measure"/>
      <definition
                  value="The unit of measure specified in the Unified Code for Units of Measure (UCUM) []."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.unit"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.value">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Maginitude Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The magnitude of the quantity measured in terms of the unit."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="decimal"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/real-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.translation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator.translation"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="An alternative representation of the same physical quantity expressed in a different unit, of a different unit code system and possibly with a different value."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="PQ.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator"/>
      <label value="Denominator"/>
      <definition
                  value="The quantity that devides the numerator in the ratio. The default is the integer number 1 (one.) The denominator must not be zero."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="RTO_PQ_PQ.denominator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element

      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

      <definition

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

        <profile

      <binding>

        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>

      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>

            value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

      <min value="0"/>

      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>

             id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator.translation">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator.translation"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="An alternative representation of the same physical quantity expressed in a different unit, of a different unit code system and possibly with a different value."/>
      <min value="0"/>

      <base>

        <min value="0"/>

    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable"/>
      <short value="Médicament"/>
      <definition value="Médicament"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      </type>
    </element>

      </type>

        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SubstanceAdministration"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.extension">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.templateId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.templateId"/>
      <definition

      <max value="*"/>

    </element>

      <slicing>

      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.typeId.displayable">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.typeId.root">

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.typeId.extension">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
