                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.templateId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>

        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>

        <max value="1"/>

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="REFR"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.contextConductionInd">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frPrescription.negationInd">

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <max value="*"/>

    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementSubordonne.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>

                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/RegionOfInterest"/>

    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementSubordonne.substanceAdministration">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.substanceAdministration"/>
      <short
             value="Traitement subordonné : 

Une entrée Traitement de premier niveau peut contenir une ou plusieurs sous-entrées 'Traitement' subordonnées pour les cas spécifiques des dosages progressifs, fractionnés ou conditionnels, ou pour gérer la combinaison de médicaments.
L'utilisation de sous-entrées 'Traitement' subordonnées pour traiter ces cas est facultative. Dans ce cas, l'information doit être fournie dans la partie narrative de l'entrée 'Traitement' de premier niveau sous forme de texte libre."/>
      <definition value="Traitement subordonné"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.substanceAdministration"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SubstanceAdministration"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-traitement-subordonne"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementSubordonne.supply">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.supply"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.supply"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Supply"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frInstructionsAuPatient"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EntryRelationship"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.typeId.displayable">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.root"/>

        <max value="1"/>

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.typeId.extension">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

      <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>

      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>

             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>

        <path value="EntryRelationship.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="SUBJ"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.contextConductionInd">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.negationInd">

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.act">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <short
             value="Instruction au patient : 

Les instructions au patient peuvent être transmises, sous forme textuelle, dans une entrée Instructions au patient (Patient Medication Instructions – 1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.3) portée par un élément &quot;entryRelationship&quot;."/>
      <definition value="Instructions au patient"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.act"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-instructions-au-patient"/>
      </type>
    </element>

    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId.displayable">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId.extension">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.templateId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="RSON"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.contextConductionInd">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.negationInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.sequenceNumber">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.sequenceNumber"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.sequenceNumber"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/INT"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.seperatableInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.seperatableInd"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.seperatableInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/BL"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.act">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <short
             value="Motif du traitement : 

Le motif du traitement (ou raison de l'administration) peut être indiqué en faisant référence à autre entrée du document CDA constituant ce motif (par exemple une entrée Problème).
Dans l'élément 'act' de l'entryRelationship :
- L'attribut @actCode='ACT'
- L'attribut @moodCode='EVN'
- L'élément 'id' de l'élément référencé est repris à l'identique dans les entrées à lier
- L'élément 'code' doit concorder avec celui utilisé par l'élément de référence."/>
      <definition value="Motif du traitement"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.act"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-reference-interne"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.encounter">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.encounter"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.encounter"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Encounter"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Observation"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>

            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.substanceAdministration"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.substanceAdministration"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SubstanceAdministration"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.supply">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.supply"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Supply"/>

    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.reference">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.reference"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.reference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Reference"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition"/>
      <short
             value="Précondition : 

Permet de décrire les conditions préalables à l'utilisation du médicament.      L'attribut @value de l'élément 'reference' est une URI qui pointe vers la partie narrative du document CDA décrivant ces conditions préalables. "/>
      <definition value="Précondition"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Precondition"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <label value="Displayable"/>

      </base>

      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <profile

      <binding>

        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>

      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.realmCode"/>
      <definition

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>

      <type>
